chunks.title: Reign and Defeat of Ahaz
chunks.reason: Introduces King Ahaz's wicked reign and the initial military defeats by Aram and Israel.

chunks.title: The Captives of Ephraim
chunks.reason: Details the slaughter in Judah, the prophet Oded's speech to the army, and the return of the captives.

chunks.title: Ahaz's Further Apostasy
chunks.reason: Describes Ahaz seeking Assyrian help, further raids by Edomites and Philistines, and his worsening idolatry.

chunks.title: Death of Ahaz
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter with a summary reference to his records and his burial.
